vision_profile.current_state: Pooja is a 20-year-old part-time Data Entry Operator with a Diploma in Computer Applications, earning 9000 monthly.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Her biggest fear is getting stuck in low-paid data entry due to a lack of coding confidence and structured learning for Python, problem-solving, and GitHub.
vision_profile.top_motivation: She is highly motivated to learn Python step-by-step to secure a paid tech internship, contribute to household expenses, and prove a tech career is possible to her family.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You understand core Python concepts, write basic scripts, and manage data effectively to start your tech journey.
milestones.identity_statement: I am building my foundational coding skills to unlock new opportunities in tech and show my family what's possible.

science.desc: You've written a small Python script to calculate a student's grade, but it's giving incorrect results for certain inputs. Debug the conditional logic and fix the errors.

modules.title: Algorithms & Data Handling
lessons: File I/O: Reading & Writing Text Files

video.title: Reading and Writing Files in Python

science.desc: You need to read a list of student names and their scores from a text file, calculate the average score, and then write the names of students who passed (score > 60) to a new file.
Explain the difference between Git and GitHub, and describe a typical workflow for contributing to an open-source project using Git commands.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can solve coding challenges, build small applications using external libraries, and apply Object-Oriented Programming principles.
milestones.identity_statement: I am transforming theoretical knowledge into practical, demonstrable skills by building my first projects.

science.desc: You're given a CSV file with customer data containing missing values, inconsistent formats, and duplicate entries. Write a Python script using Pandas to clean and prepare this data for analysis.

scenario.title: Refactoring a Procedural Script to OOP

science.desc: Explain the four pillars of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and provide a real-world example for each in Python.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can interact with web APIs, fetch data, and build simple web applications, making you ready for paid internships.
milestones.identity_statement: I am expanding my skills to connect with real-world data and services, paving my way to a paid internship.

modules.title: Model Serving & APIs
lessons: HTTP Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE
Basic Error Handling for API Calls

video.title: Parsing and Manipulating JSON in Python

scenario.title: Extracting Specific Data from Nested JSON

science.desc: You need to fetch data from a public API (e.g., a cryptocurrency price API), parse the JSON response, and extract specific information like the current price of Bitcoin and Ethereum. Handle potential API errors gracefully.

modules.title: Data Visualization
lessons: Line Charts & Bar Charts for Trends

scenario.title: Presenting Key Findings from a Dataset

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can build more complex Python applications, handle errors robustly, and write efficient, maintainable code.
milestones.identity_statement: I am deepening my expertise to create more robust and functional applications, ready for junior developer roles.

video.title: Intro to Concurrency: Threads and Processes

science.desc: You have a Python script that processes a large number of images sequentially, which is very slow. Refactor the script to use multithreading or multiprocessing to speed up the image processing task.

video.title: Writing Effective Unit Tests with Pytest

scenario.title: Adding Logging to a Data Processing Script
Setting up a Basic CI Pipeline

science.desc: You've been asked to add a new feature to an existing Python application. Describe your approach to testing this new feature and ensuring it doesn't break existing functionality.

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can design and interact with databases, build full-fledged APIs, and deploy applications, preparing you for mid-level roles.
milestones.identity_statement: I am becoming a full-stack contributor, connecting data to user interfaces and building robust backend services.

modules.title: Database Design & Data Modeling
lessons: Performing CRUD Operations with Python & SQL

video.title: Introduction to SQL and Relational Databases

scenario.title: Designing a Schema for an E-commerce App
Building a Simple User Management System

science.desc: You are tasked with designing a database schema for a new social media application. Define the tables, relationships, and appropriate data types for users, posts, comments, and likes.

video.title: Designing Clean and Consistent REST APIs

scenario.title: Designing API Endpoints for a Blog

science.desc: You need to design a RESTful API for a new online learning platform. Describe how you would structure the endpoints for courses, users, and enrollments, and what HTTP methods you would use for common operations.

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can deploy Python applications to the cloud, ensure scalability, and monitor performance, taking on more senior responsibilities.
milestones.identity_statement: I am mastering the deployment and operational aspects of modern software, ready to build and manage scalable systems.

modules.title: Cloud & Deployment
lessons: Building Docker Images for Python Apps
Basic Cloud Services for Web Apps

scenario.title: Choosing a Cloud Service for a Web App

science.desc: Your Python web application is ready for deployment. You need to containerize it using Docker and then deploy it to a cloud platform (e.g., AWS EC2 or Google Cloud Run). Outline the steps involved.

video.title: Designing for High Traffic and Growth

scenario.title: Improving API Response Times with Caching

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You can integrate complex systems, apply advanced Python patterns, and lead project development, preparing you for lead or architect roles.
milestones.identity_statement: I am becoming a leader, capable of designing and implementing sophisticated tech solutions and guiding others.

scenario.title: Designing an ML Model Deployment Pipeline

video.title: Fairness, Bias, and Transparency in AI

scenario.title: Addressing Bias in a Hiring AI

science.desc: You are developing an AI-powered system for loan approval. How would you ensure fairness and transparency in its decision-making process to avoid discriminatory outcomes?

video.title: Mastering Coding and System Design Interviews

science.desc: Conduct a mock technical interview focusing on a medium-difficulty Python coding problem and a basic system design question related to a web API.
